2026-04-21T23:44:15.1969703Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T23:44:15.1970159Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T23:44:15.1970723Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T23:44:15.1971036Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T23:44:15.1971271Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T23:44:15.1971426Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-21T23:44:15.1971774Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-21T23:44:15.1972013Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-21T23:44:15.1972523Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m

This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. Supports advanced search syntax for precise filtering.","type":"string"},"sort":{"description":"Sort repositories by field, defaults to best match","enum":["stars","forks","help-wanted-issues","updated"],"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"},"name":"search_repositories"}]}}}
